positive: Minimalist line art depiction of a stylized crescent moon rising over a geometric, abstract landscape of soft mountains and constellations. The design should utilize strong, continuous black lines on a crisp white background. Elements must be easily reproducible and scalable for screen printing, featuring a blend of botanical elements (like stylized ferns or stars) integrated subtly into the celestial pattern. High contrast, crisp edges, graphic novel quality, clean silhouette, centered composition, art deco influence, retro-futurism, symmetry, vector art style.
negative: blur, low contrast, watermark, signature, text, logo, artifact, grain, noise, messy lines, grainy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy
